Building the Future with Modular Innovation

Improving and perfecting modular building technologies by fostering long-lasting partnerships among developers, architects, engineers, contractors, and manufacturers worldwide.

View Our Work Get in Touch
who We are

Founded in 2019 by Fuad Sweiss, GMP perfects modular building technologies by fostering partnerships that reduce costs, accelerate delivery, and minimize environmental impact.

30%–50% Faster Than Traditional
28 Day ADU Delivery

What We Offer

Integrated capabilities spanning construction, compliance, and healthcare infrastructure delivery.

01

Modular Construction

Innovative off-site building solutions for commercial, residential, and industrial applications.

Design-Build Capability
Prefabricated Modules
Sustainable Materials

Project Management

Expert project delivery with DoD/Military compliance and proven methodology.

Risk Management
Quality Assurance

Healthcare Facilities

Telemedicine Centers
Modular Clinics
Emergency Response

04

Civil Construction

Infrastructure and civil construction projects through Agbayani Construction.

Bridge Systems
Utility Installation
Road & Highway

Global Reach

Operating nationwide, delivering reliable solutions across global markets with local expertise

10+ Trade Partners Manufacturers, engineers & contractors
2 Offices Oakland headquarters & Irvine operations

28 Day ADU Accelerated dwelling unit delivery
